text: Alright everyone, let us get started. So the main topic today is the Q3 roadmap. Sarah, can you walk us through the timeline? Sure, so we are looking at three major milestones. First is the beta launch in July, then the public release in August, and finally the enterprise rollout in September. That sounds aggressive. Do we have enough resources for that? I think so, but we might need two more engineers on the frontend team. Okay, let us add that to the action items. John, can you draft a hiring plan by next Friday?
